cart.description: Shopping cart or bag that contains products selected for purchase.

checkout.description: Final purchase flow, not generic checking or inspection.
checkout.context: Checkout steps, payment, and order confirmation.

seller.description: Marketplace user or business offering an item for sale.
seller.context: Marketplace listings, seller dashboards, and support.

refund.description: Money returned to a buyer after a payment or order reversal.

OTP.description: One-time password used for account or transaction verification.
